title: anthoxanthum puelii var. lloydii
intro: Anthoxanthum puelii var. lloydii is a variety of the Argentine Pheasant's Tail Grass, a type of flowering plant in the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its medicinal properties. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihemorrhagic properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Anthoxanthum puelii var. lloydii is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as in the form of extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
